summary: Frontend-only testing for VenueDetailPage Gallery Modal, EMI Calculator, Share/Favorite buttons, Hero navigation, and FAQ accordion. All 17 features tested successfully. Minor mobile UI issue found with view gallery button z-index overlap.

ui_bugs.issue: On mobile, the '2 Photos' button (data-testid='view-gallery-button') is partially obscured by the mobile venue info overlay at bottom of hero image. The overlay intercepts pointer events, preventing clicks on the gallery button.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Adjust z-index of gallery button or move it above the mobile venue info overlay. The button at line 638-645 has class 'absolute bottom-4 right-4' which overlaps with the mobile info overlay at line 657-679.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}. This appears on Gallery Modal and EMI Calculator modals.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to Gallery Modal and EMI Calculator dialogs for better accessibility.

action_items: LOW: Fix mobile view gallery button z-index overlap with venue info overlay
LOW: Add accessibility descriptions to DialogContent components

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major features pass, minor mobile z-index issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: VenueDetailPage enhanced features fully tested. Gallery Modal (Photos/Video/360° tabs), EMI Calculator, Share/Favorite buttons, FAQ accordion all functional. Video and 360° content are MOCKED placeholders. Test venue: Taj Palace New Delhi (venue_658884a4e9c1) with 2 photos. Key data-testids: view-gallery-button, gallery-modal, gallery-tab-photos/video/360, gallery-close-btn, gallery-fullscreen-view, gallery-back-to-grid, gallery-prev-photo, gallery-next-photo, open-emi-calculator, emi-loan-amount, emi-tenure-{6,12,18,24,36}, faq-tab, faq-question-*, faq-enquire-btn, back-button, 360-tour-button, share-button, favorite-button, prev-image, next-image, desktop-360-button.

mocked_features.Video tab content: MOCKED - Shows placeholder with 'Video Walkthrough' message and 'Request Video Tour' CTA. No real video URL.
mocked_features.360° tab content: MOCKED - Shows placeholder with '360° Virtual Tour' message, 'Start Virtual Tour' and 'Book Site Visit' CTAs. No real 360 tour.

mobile_gallery_button_overlap.root_cause: VenueDetailPage.js lines 638-645: The gallery button with class 'absolute bottom-4 right-4' is positioned at the bottom-right of the hero image. On mobile (lines 657-679), there's also a venue info overlay with class 'lg:hidden absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4' that covers the bottom of the hero. These two elements overlap, and the venue info overlay intercepts pointer events.
mobile_gallery_button_overlap.reproduction: Open page on mobile (390px viewport), try to click '2 Photos' button - click is intercepted by venue info text.
mobile_gallery_button_overlap.suggested_fix: Add z-index to gallery button higher than overlay, or reposition button on mobile to avoid overlap.
